'''Londrah''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Defel/Legends|Defel]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] who used his [[Species/Legends|species]]' natural ability at stealth to infiltrate heavily secured facilities. He was often used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], and he was ordered by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to assassinate [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] leader [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]].
